title: mikania oblongifolia
intro: Mikania oblongifolia, also known as the 'wild lettuce', is a perennial herbaceous plant native to tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific. Its leaves and stems have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Mikania oblongifolia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Mikania oblongifolia is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in herbal supplements to harness its medicinal properties.
